_comment: Content provenance manifest — Horizon 1 of the market-extraction plan.
RULE: every file is ORIGINAL (safe for the market app) unless listed under
'licensed' (third-party program content that cannot be marketed) or
'scratch' (concept/superseded files that ship to neither build).
tools/build-market.py consumes this to generate the clean market repo
and to CI-check that no licensed content leaks into it.
When adding a new influencer page/asset, list it here in the same change.

cookbook._comment: Roadmap 4.7 — unified market. build-market.py's --cookbook-root checks out this repo and mounts it under cookbook/ inside the Rolodex build (deploy-time merge only; the master 4-Weeks-to-Open- site itself never carries cookbook content — see MARKET:ADD in dashboard.html). Everything in Mikes-Cookbook is original content today, so 'exclude' is empty.
cookbook.watch: Mikes-Cookbook's COLLECTIONS lists "Kelli Cross' Recipes" (Heritage) as status:coming-soon — no files exist for it yet. If it goes live and is licensed (non-original) content, add its files to 'exclude' and its brand terms to the array above before the next deploy.
